'''Nargo''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Nigel VI]]. The [[Buzchub]], [[Und'l]], hired some [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] to transport crates of [[lexonite]] from Nargo to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lohopa II]], describing the goods as "[[Spice/Legends|spice]]."<ref name="P" />

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=The Package (adventure)|book=Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)}} {{1st}}
